issues.sample: RECALLS ON MITSUBISHI MOTOR NORTH AMERICA, INC.  STATES THE HEAD LIGHTS AND AOR BAGS NEED TO BE REPLACED, BUT I NEVER GOT NOTICE FROM THEM FOR THE RECALLS IN THE MAIL NOR AN EMAIL. I ALSO HAD PROBLEMS WITH MAINTENANCE LIGHT ON DASH GOING OFF WHEN OIL CHANGE WAS DONE ON MY CAR. WI

narrative.headline: What 2016 Mitsubishi Mirage owners report most
narrative.summary: Across 1 owner complaints to NHTSA, the most reported area is Exterior Lighting (100% of reports). Some reports involve a fire or crash — read the details below.
